meta.poznamky: forward má hodnotu 0 (špatně). Student musí změnit na 90.

cms.task_text: Kód kreslí rovnostranný trojúhelník, ale [hlp]délka strany je nulová[/hlp]. Opravte ji na správnou hodnotu [hlp]90 bodů[/hlp].
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="50" y="50"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">3</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">0</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">120</field></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="50" y="50"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">3</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">120</field></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
